© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
Use This Checklist For Every New Automation Workflow
Make sure MailChimp plan includes access to the automated email feature
“Automation” email type is selected
Choose automation template, or create new one from scratch
Select automation workflow template OR create workflow from scratch
Initial trigger set correctly
Scheduling is correct for all individual emails
Recipients are correctly filtered by segments, tags, OR conditions
Post-send actions are correctly configured
SETUP:
Test emails sent and visually inspected on desktop and mobile
Test all email links (including images) to ensure they work
Set up A/B split test of subject lines (optional, but recommended)
SETUP:
Email trigger is correct
Email is correctly scheduled
Subject line is compelling (creates interest or curiosity)
Email preview is present and encourages opens (optional)
Body copy is finalized, intriguing and free of typos
Reader knows “what’s in it for me” early in email copy
Using no more than one image and have it linked correctly
All body copy links and/or buttons are linked correctly
Add small empty space at bottom of email above footer
All footer links and/or info is present (usually universal)
Unsubscribe link is present and functional (usually automatic)
EMAILS [REPEAT FOR EACH EMAIL IN AUTOMATION WORKFLOW]:
When complete… FIRE AWAY!
MAILCHIMP AUTOMATED
EMAIL CHECKLIST
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
